name: exceljs
when_to_use: 交付「打开即用的带样式 Excel 报表/财务表/带公式模板」时用——单元格格式/字体/填充/边框、公式、合并单元格、数字格式、冻结窗格、内嵌图片、多 sheet;只要逗号分隔纯数据用 papaparse,只在网页里显示表格用 ag-grid/tabulator,读现有 Office 表格用 xlsx(SheetJS)。
why_valuable: .xlsx 是 zip 打包的 OOXML,AI 手写字节不可能;papaparse 只给纯 CSV(丢全部格式)。exceljs 全量在 npm 且支持完整样式,独占「产出真正的带样式 .xlsx 二进制」。

data_in.note: 以 sheet 为单位:columns 定义表头/键/宽,addRow 用对象(按 column.key 对齐)或数组(按列序)喂行;样式挂在 cell/row/column 的 .style。产出经 await wb.xlsx.writeBuffer() → Buffer,包 Blob 下载。

sheets.name: string —— worksheet 名,默认 'Sheet1'
sheets.columns?: Array<{ header:string, key:string, width?:number, style?:object }> —— header 表头文字、key 供 addRow 对象对齐、width 列宽(字符数近似)、style 可含 numFmt/font/alignment
sheets.rows: Array<Record<string,any> | any[]> —— 对象按 column.key 对齐 / 数组按列序;数值/日期建议配 column.style.numFmt

provides._note: headless-primitive:产出 xlsx 二进制,不渲染,无 carriers 矩阵。

boot.note: exceljs 是 default 导出(import ExcelJS)。面向 Node,+esm 约 940KB(含 jszip/stream/archiver shim),浏览器端首载较重。writeBuffer 返回的是 polyfill 的 Buffer(Uint8Array 子类),可直接进 Blob。产字节无渲染,无 shadow/head 足迹。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr exceljs@4.4.0 +esm (938KB): export{Ve as default} — boot uses default import ExcelJS. index.d.ts: class Workbook{ readonly xlsx:Xlsx; addWorksheet(name?,options?):Worksheet; addImage(img):number }; Xlsx.writeBuffer(options?):Promise<Buffer>; Worksheet.columns:Array<Partial<Column>>, addRow(data,style?):Row, mergeCells(...), addImage(id,range); Column{header,key,width,style,hidden} — all match schema/boot. Global-footprint grep: document.head 0, <style/insertRule/adoptedStyleSheets 0 (NO style injection). document.createElement 2 / addEventListener 2 / append 3 — inspected each: ALL inside the bundled core-js task-scheduler polyfill (setImmediate: t.addEventListener('message',p,!1) postMessage path + guarded onreadystatechange iframe/script technique, e.g. (w=l('iframe')).style.display='none',e.appendChild(w) and _.appendChild(p) with removeChild cleanup), NOT ExcelJS's own logic; transient microtask plumbing. ExcelJS produces a Buffer and renders nothing to the DOM, so shadow isolation is unaffected. globalDomMutation/globalEvents = conditional to honestly disclose the bundled-polyfill scheduler; no style injection and no persistent visible DOM.

en.when_to_use: Use it to deliver ready-to-open styled Excel reports, financial sheets, or formula templates with cell formatting, fonts, fills, borders, formulas, merged cells, number formats, frozen panes, embedded images, and multiple sheets. For comma-separated plain data use papaparse; to display a table only in a web page use ag-grid/tabulator; to read existing Office spreadsheets use xlsx (SheetJS).
en.why_valuable: .xlsx is OOXML packaged as ZIP, so AI cannot handwrite the bytes; papaparse only produces plain CSV and loses all formatting. exceljs is fully available on npm, supports complete styling, and uniquely produces a real styled .xlsx binary.

data_in.note: Work sheet by sheet: columns defines headers, keys, and widths; addRow accepts objects aligned by column.key or arrays aligned by column order. Styles live on cell/row/column .style. Produce the file with await wb.xlsx.writeBuffer() -> Buffer, wrap it in a Blob, and download it.

sheets.name: string -- Worksheet name; default 'Sheet1'
sheets.columns?: Array<{ header:string, key:string, width?:number, style?:object }> -- header is display text, key aligns addRow objects, width is approximate character count, and style may contain numFmt/font/alignment
sheets.rows: Array<Record<string,any> | any[]> -- Objects align by column.key and arrays by column order; pair numeric/date values with column.style.numFmt
